citations: Input: "LLM proposal: one conversation_summary card containing an entire 8000 word transcript."
payload.reason: An entire 8000-word transcript is too verbose and unstructured to be a durable memory item. It would likely include transient, redundant, or low-signal content and is better summarized or omitted rather than stored as a single conversation_summary card.

raw_text: {"durable":false,"decision":"do_not_store","reason":"An entire 8000-word transcript is too verbose and unstructured to be a durable memory item. It would likely include transient, redundant, or low-signal content and is better summarized or omitted rather than stored as a single conversation_summary card.","answer":"do_not_store","citations":["Input: \"LLM proposal: one conversation_summary card containing an entire 8000 word transcript.\""]}
